blockers.description: VAL-REPORTES-002 and VAL-REPORTES-004 cannot be fully tested because no bookings/series are available to select in the current data state. The action buttons are context-dependent and only appear when a booking or series is selected.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Cleared filters but no data appeared. The page structure is correct but no test data is available.

summary: Tested 14 assertions for Reportes, Auditoría, and Configuración. 10 passed, 4 blocked (2 due to no selectable data in current state, 2 due to context-dependent UI that requires prior selection). Auditoría and Configuración sections are fully functional with proper filters, tables, forms, and interactive elements.
